title: crotalaria inyangensis
intro: Crotalaria inyangensis, also known as a species of flowering plant in the legume family, is a shrub native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders, and has been reported to have anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. In traditional medicine, Crotalaria inyangensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs, to leverage its health benefits.
